headline: Elon Musk Announces Over 3 Million Tesla Cars Produced, Congratulates Giga Shanghai
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk on Sunday tweeted a congratulatory message to Gig Shanghai for producing its one millionth car, and announced that Tesla has now manufactured over three million electric vehicles.

headline: Elon Musk Tweeted: Congrats Giga Shanghai on making millionth car! Total Teslas made now over 3M.
Too Busy For Facebook Marketplace Pick-Up? There's A DoorDasher For That
summary: As Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) explores other revenue avenues amid shrinking ad sales, it may have stitched up a partnership with online food ordering and delivery platform DoorDash, Inc. (NYSE: DASH).

headline: Wall Street Journal Reported Friday Facebook Marketplace and DoorDash Team Up for Local Deliveries

summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is likely to significantly expand its own advertising business, Bloomberg columnist Mark Gurman said in his weekly "Power On" newsletter.

Meet Javier Olivan, Sheryl Sandberg's Successor At Meta
summary: In June, Sheryl Sandberg stepped down as COO of Meta Platform Inc (NASDAQ: META), after which, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg named long-term associate Javier Olivan as Sanberg's successor.
